product_highlights: SYLOID® silicas — industry benchmark for mattifying and soft-focus effects
Multiple grades for liquid and cream formulations
Consistency, silky texture, and soft-focus in one ingredient
Suitable for foundations, primers, moisturizers, and sunscreens
notes: W.R. Grace is a global specialty chemicals company with a leading position in cosmetic silica technology. Their SYLOID® silica range is the industry benchmark for mattifying and soft-focus effects in liquid and cream formulations. SYLOID® silicas can be used to achieve desired consistency, silky texture, mattifying, and soft-focus effects across a wide range of cosmetic applications including foundations, primers, moisturizers, and sunscreens, making them an essential ingredient for premium cosmetic formulations.
